# Codex Command Rules

Readable copy of the shared shell-command policy used by the Harness hook.

## Matching Rules

- Command rules use argv-prefix matching.
- Blocked prefixes win over allowed prefixes.
- Commands outside the allow list are rejected.
- Codex hook enforcement currently applies to `Bash` tool events.

## Allowed Command Prefixes

- `git status`
- `git diff`
- `git ls-files`
- `ls`
- `cat`
- `rg`

## Blocked Command Prefixes

- `rm`
- `git reset`
- `git checkout`
- `git clean`
